---
title: 'Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc'
date: '2015-01-02T07:13:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6692945021415072036'
blogger_filename: '/2015/01/thaddeus-j-b-rotcudnoc.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<span xmlns=''><p><span style='color:black'><strong>Character Sketch (<a href='https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/'>Hints</a>)</strong><br />				</span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'><strong>Motivation: Power/Control, to be the apex of every triangle, and the conductor of every interaction. </strong><br />				</span></p><p> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Character Sketch <br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Photos:<br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Black Suit, real name unknown<br /></span></p><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Alias: Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Alias:<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Alias:<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Alias:<br /></span></li></ul><p> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Thaddeus abhors social inventions. He is a trillion-aire. His net personal (non-corporate) net worth is equal, at least, to the annual GDP of North America combined. <br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>He needs to be in control of all things at all times. Money is not a motivation, it is a tool used to achieve that control. He owns half the US Senators, and blackmails another 1/4 of them. He considers Warren Buffet a small time nuisance, and sometimes an unwitting participant in his schemes. <br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Real power is wielded secretly, quietly, and firmly. He never uses his real name, he's not even sure if he can remember his real name. <br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Today he's decided to be known as Thaddeus.<br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>Overview: Traits, Strengths, SDI, Type, Gifts, Talents, Skills<br /></span></p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'> <br /> </p><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Physical Description<br /></span></div><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Hair<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>White Hiar<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Clean, Professional, part to the side. <br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Bright White, Bounces a bit if he walks/turns quickly<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Eyes<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Grey<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>No Glasses<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Height/Weight<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>5'7"<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>155 lbs<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Fit, not buff, but fit. <br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Style of Dress<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Typically wears expensive business suits, popular/common cuts and colors. <br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Most Commonly wears a black suit and white shirt.<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Speech<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Hard to pin down, possibly a subtle German underpinning. <br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Speaks with simple phrases, may throw out a few college words from time to time which betray an intelligence. Prefers to get to what he is going to say directly, without misunderstanding, to control the situation with his words. <br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'> How Character Feels About Physical Appearance<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Appearance is a tool used to wield power. I often wear a black suit, white shirt, and various ties. Always up to date with the latest fashions, but with a conservative and ubiquitous style. Flashy is not my thing. <br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>The clothing should be expensive enough to make an impression on those who know what money can buy, but neutral enough to be vague in description to any authorities. I always make contingencies, ensuring that any evidence of my presence is wiped from cameras and recordings, but in this new digital age, you can never be too cautious, so I keep a low profile. <br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Appearance, like nearly all things for Thaddeus, is a finished product. Finley tuned and honed over many decades. <br /></span></li></ul></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Personality<br /></span></div><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Mannerisms<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>certain little thing the character likes to do, like tearing up napkins while waiting for food at a restaurant<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>another certain little thing the character likes to do<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Bad Habits<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Bad Habit 1<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Bad Habit 2<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Strengths/Weaknesses<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Strengths<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Weaknesses<br /></span></li></ul></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Likes/Dislikes<br /></span></div><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Likes<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Snifter of Cognac<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Making People Nervous<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Dislikes<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Things that are not well made / done right. Mistakes.<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>When things happen that he did not plan for / make contingencies for. <br /></span></li></ul></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Family<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Parents - Orphan<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Siblings - None<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Extended Family - None<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Hobbies<br /></span></div><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Hobby 1<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Science/Discovery<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>To be used to gain more control. <br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Hobby 2<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>details about hobby<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>character's feelings about hobby<br /></span></li></ul></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>History<br /></span></div><ul><li><div><span style='color:black'>Childhood<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>character's feelings about childhood<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Teen Years<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>character's feelings about teen years<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Young Adulthood<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>character's feelings about young adulthood<br /></span></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'>Just Before the Story Begins<br /></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>Event<br /></span></li><li><span style='color:black'>character's feelings about events<br /></span></li></ul></li></ul></li><li><div><span style='color:black'><strong>Conflicts<br /></strong></span></div><ul><li><span style='color:black'><strong>Must be in Power/Control, to be the apex of every triangle, and the conductor of every interaction. <br /></strong></span></li><li><span style='color:black'><strong>Outer Conflicts<br /></strong></span></li></ul></li></ul><p> <br /> </p><p style='margin-left: 3pt'><span style='color:black'>******<br /></span></p><p><span style='color:black'>Someone is brought in by Dr. Briar to fix the project with sound and spirit world experiments. He is superior in intellect to most, he is a strong strategist, and he has motives that are not entirely purely scientific. His motives differ from Dr. Briar's in that sense. He's RICH… but so rich that making more money has no appeal to him. He'd be just as likely to drop a billion on a failing business just for the fun of turning it around as he would to just watch the money burn and spin that business wildly out of control. He's bored… he likes the power of anonymity. He made Dr. Briar think that Dr. Briar sought out his help; when in fact, he orchestrated the whole thing. <br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>Who is this Antagonist? Does he have a name? Will we ever know it? How much mystery is good, vs how much do we need to build flesh and blood into this guy and make him more real, menacing? Then again, the unknown has it's own fear built in.  <br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>He motivated by money, in the sense that once should have gain, value, profit of some kind of out one's expenditure of energy. That value added need not be monetary though. Power. Control. Can the other dimensions, what some call the spirit world, be accessed? Can they be manipulated? Can they be controlled? These are the real power, the real questions. <br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>***<br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>"Yes, Dr. Briar I am! That is why you brought me here. To fix this reject project and bring something valuable out of it. Keep me appraised of any changes."<br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>The black suited man turned and left the room. His tuft of white hair bouncing along as he walked away.<br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p> <br /> </p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>****<br /></span></p><p> <br /> </p><p><span style='color:black'>He enjoyed seeing that look on people's face, when they first realize that they were never the one in charge or in control. When they realize that the person they thought they brought on to assist, was actually the one calling the shots. What they seldom know, and could not understand, is that they were never calling the shots. They were all part of his orchestrated plan. They were but a violin in his symphony, and easily replaceable. <br /></span></p><p><span style='color:black'> <br /></span> </p></span>
